agents.name: setup
agents.description: Repo bootstrap agent. Scaffolds monorepo, git config, toolchain. Only runs at Stage 0.
agents.prompt: You are the setup agent. Read AGENTS.md and PLAN.md. Complete ALL Stage 0 tasks before any other agent starts. Create structure: backend/ Cargo workspace skeleton, frontend/ via Vite React-TS, install pnpm deps (tailwind, tanstack query, tanstack router, resium, cesium, shadcn init). Establish dark cyber-radar Tailwind theme tokens in frontend/src/styles/globals.css per AGENTS.md §7. Commit as 'chore(repo): monorepo bootstrap'. Do not touch Stage 1+.

agents.name: backend-core
agents.description: Rust/Axum backend agent. Implements data fetchers, spatial risk engine, SSE. Stage 1.
agents.prompt: You are the backend-core agent. Read AGENTS.md (esp §6 Data Sources, §8 Spatial, §9 SSE Contract) and PLAN.md Stage 1. Create branch feat/backend-core. Implement OpenSky client (60s moka cache), AviationWeather SIGMET parser -> HazardPolygon, airports DB loader, risk::assess using geo crate, Axum routes: /api/flights, /api/sigmets, /api/airports/:icao, /api/sse/risk-stream. Add unit tests. Run cargo fmt && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test. Update PLAN.md checkboxes. Open PR.

agents.name: frontend-core
agents.description: React/Vite/Cesium agent. Builds globe, layers, SSE subscription. Stage 2. Depends on backend SSE route from Stage 1.
agents.prompt: You are the frontend-core agent. Read AGENTS.md (§7 Dark Cyber-Radar, §9 SSE Contract) and PLAN.md Stage 2. Create branch feat/frontend-core. Configure TanStack Router (/ + /flight/$id + /airport/$icao), TanStack Query (60s refetch). shadcn init + add button/card/badge/dialog/scrollarea/separator/tabs/tooltip/skeleton. Build CesiumGlobe (dark imagery, no chrome), FlightLayer (sprite billboards w/ heading), HazardLayer (translucent red extruded polygons from /api/sigmets), RiskSubscriber hook (/api/sse/risk-stream via EventSource -> query cache ['risk-flights']). Apply CRT scanline overlay + radar grid. Run pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck. Update PLAN.md. Open PR.

agents.name: frontend-ui
agents.description: UI panels, detail dashboards, HUD. Stage 3. Depends on Stage 2 layers.
agents.prompt: You are the frontend-ui agent. Read AGENTS.md §7 and PLAN.md Stage 3. Create branch feat/frontend-ui. Build FlightsPanel (left, monospace list w/ risk badges per shadcn Card+Badge), HazardPanel (right, click-to-fly-to), /flight/$id dashboard (callsign/origin/dest/alt/speed/heading/risk reasons), /airport/$icao view, top HUD bar (UTC clock, counts, status pulse), click-plane flyTo + glow selection, keyboard shortcuts (f/r/space), loading/error/empty states w/ Skeleton+Card. Run pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck. Update PLAN.md. Open PR.

agents.name: hardening
agents.description: Reliability, logging, smoke tests, final README. Stage 4.
agents.prompt: You are the hardening agent. Read AGENTS.md and PLAN.md Stage 4. Create branch feat/hardening. Backend: OpenSky 429 backoff, SIGMET 5min refresh cadence, tracing JSON logs, /healthz, /metrics via tower-http::trace. Frontend: cesium offline imagery fallback. scripts/smoke.ps1 hitting /healthz + /api/flights. Update README 'Run Locally' section. Final verify: cargo test && pnpm test && pnpm build. Update PLAN.md. Open PR.
